ai_code:
# 1. Shipping efficiency ratio: how actual shipping compares to scheduled (non-leaky alternative to gap)
# Higher values indicate shipments taking longer than planned - strong late delivery signal
df['shipping_efficiency_ratio'] = df['days_for_shipping_real'] / (df['days_for_shipment_scheduled'] + 0.1)

# 2. Profit margin per day of shipping (economic efficiency)
# Measures if rushed/expensive shipping is justified by profit
df['profit_per_shipping_day'] = df['benefit_per_order'] / (df['days_for_shipment_scheduled'] + 1)

# 3. Customer value density (sales per geographic unit)
# High-value customers in tight geographic areas may get priority handling
df['customer_value_density'] = df['sales_per_customer'] / (np.abs(df['latitude']) + np.abs(df['longitude']) + 1)

# 4. Order complexity score combining department and category diversity
# Products from certain dept/category combinations may be harder to fulfill
df['product_complexity_score'] = (df['department_id'] * df['category_id']) / (df['days_for_shipment_scheduled'] + 1)

# 5. Geographic shipping challenge: distance from origin (0,0) weighted by scheduled time
# Captures whether scheduled shipping time is appropriate for distance
df['geo_distance_proxy'] = np.sqrt(df['latitude']**2 + df['longitude']**2)
df['shipping_distance_efficiency'] = df['geo_distance_proxy'] / (df['days_for_shipment_scheduled'] + 1)
